---
title: "Emily Eliza Wickham"
---

## Emily Eliza Wickham

**Dates:** (1826/7-1910)

**Maiden name:** (Gordon)

### Description

mother of the Rev. Gordon Wickham

### Biography

Widowed in 1862, she lived with her son Gordon at Crookham in the 1881 census.  She continued to live there after he was succeeded as vicar by his brother.

### Letters

- Letter from April 6, 1875

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
